---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Florida State University

::: {.course-entry}
**RMI XXXX — [Course Title]**  
[Undergraduate / Graduate] | [Semesters taught]  

Brief description of the course: topics covered, level, and any distinctive elements (data projects, industry guest speakers, etc.).

[[Syllabus](files/syllabus-rmiXXXX.pdf)]
:::

::: {.course-entry}
**RMI XXXX — [Course Title]**  
[Undergraduate / Graduate] | [Semesters taught]  

Brief description.

[[Syllabus](files/syllabus-rmiXXXX.pdf)]
:::

## Doctoral Mentoring

Brief note on PhD students advised, dissertation committees, etc.

## Workshops & Invited Lectures

- [Workshop title], [Venue], [Year]
- PhD Student Symposium — research trends panel
